title: Security Architecture
text: I design security controls at the architecture level for environments where failure has high operational cost. I work from threat model to implementation with a focus on hardening, defence in depth, and resilience.

title: Privacy by Design
text: I apply privacy as an engineering requirement from day one. I focus on balancing data minimisation, user control, and transparency with business needs.

title: Software Engineering
text: I build and review software in C, C++, C#, Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, and related tooling, with an emphasis on secure defaults and long-term maintainability.

title: Systems & Infrastructure
text: I have hands-on experience across Linux, Active Directory, storage, networking, and cloud-adjacent infrastructure, including maintenance on-site in datacenters.

title: Academic Research
text: I hold a PhD in Computer Science from IT University of Copenhagen with research spanning data flow, firmware, and architecture. I turn hypothetical research ideas into practical engineering decisions.

title: Technical Teaching & Mentoring
text: I have lectured 500+ students in Operating Systems and C at IT University of Copenhagen. I deliver technically advanced topics to a diverse audience.
